key_predictive_features: Gold-Silver Ratio (GSR) — primary mean-reversion signal, current ~60:1 near fair value (down from 105:1 in Apr 2025)
CFTC COT Positioning — commercials net short, speculators net long; managed-money long reduction signals pullback risk
Solar installation growth rate — >200M oz silver demand/year by end-2026, 25%+ annual growth
Mine supply deficit — 6th consecutive year of structural deficit, 100-120M oz annual shortfall
EV adoption rate — 25-50g silver per EV, 2-3x more than ICE vehicles
USD strength (DXY) — inverse correlation, silver more sensitive than gold
Real interest rates — negative real rates favor silver accumulation
Silver ETP inflows — 187M oz YTD additions in 2025, strong physical demand signal

fundamental_drivers.supply: Flat mine production despite elevated prices. New projects face 3-5 year development timelines. Recycling covers ~15% of demand. Structural deficit persists through 2028+.
fundamental_drivers.demand_industrial: 55% of total demand. Solar PV (10-20g per panel), EVs, 5G infrastructure, electronics. Industrial demand grows 5-8% annually.
fundamental_drivers.demand_investment: ETPs, coins/bars, futures speculation. Investment demand is the swing factor causing 20%+ price moves.
fundamental_drivers.price_forecast_consensus: Base: $87-92 by end-2026. Bull: $100-135. Bear: $62-73. Current drop to $68 is within bear-case range.

cross_asset_correlations.gold: Correlation 0.85-0.92 over 30 days, but silver amplifies gold moves 1.5-2x
cross_asset_correlations.copper: Correlation 0.60-0.70 — shared industrial demand driver. Copper weakness predicts silver industrial demand softening.
cross_asset_correlations.DXY: Inverse correlation -0.55 to -0.70. USD strength is primary headwind.
cross_asset_correlations.SPY: Weak positive correlation 0.20-0.35 in risk-on; decouples in risk-off as silver acts as safe haven.
cross_asset_correlations.BTC: Low correlation 0.10-0.25 normally, but both respond to macro liquidity conditions.

seasonal_patterns.strongest_months: January (65% positive), October (68% positive), November-December (late-year rally)
seasonal_patterns.weakest_months: February (weakest since 2020 pattern shift), June-August (mid-year weakness)
seasonal_patterns.current_month_june: Historically weak — current $74→$68 drop is seasonally consistent
seasonal_patterns.volatility_pattern: September has highest average volatility (35% vs gold's 18%)
seasonal_patterns.post_2020_shift: Pattern reversed from pre-2020: March now strong (was weak), February now weak (was strong)

papers_and_models: FXStreet GSR Mean Reversion Analysis (Oct 2025) — RSI/BB on ratio, not price
USAGOLD GSR Guide 2025 — historical range 40:1-90:1, contrarian framework
LiteFinance XAG Forecast Models — multi-factor regression with COT, DXY, industrial PMI
InvestingHaven Silver Seasonality Study — monthly return distributions 2000-2025

recommended_new_signals.description: RSI(14) + BB(20,2) applied to Gold/Silver ratio instead of raw XAG price
Track COMEX registered inventory drawdowns, ETP flow data, and mine production reports as leading indicator
recommended_new_signals.data_source: COMEX data via API, Silver Institute reports

recommended_new_signals.description: Track IEA/IRENA solar capacity additions as leading indicator for industrial silver demand
recommended_new_signals.expected_accuracy: Unknown — very long horizon (quarters), better as prophecy input

deep_dives.implementation_notes: The $74→$68 drop puts silver at the low end of bear-case forecasts. GSR at ~60 is near fair value so the ratio isn't screaming a contrarian signal. Key risk: if GSR drops below 50, silver is historically overextended relative to gold. COT data showing managed-money long reduction is bearish near-term. Seasonally June is weak — supports waiting for Oct entry. Our current Mean Reversion signal (52.6%) applies generic indicators to price; switching to GSR-based MR should improve accuracy for metals specifically.

key_predictive_features: MVRV Z-Score — currently ~1.2, in historically positive 1.0-1.5 accumulation band (7/7 positive 12m returns since 2013)
Adjusted SOPR — at 0.97-0.99, indicating capitulation (coins sold below cost basis)
Exchange reserves — 7-year low, indicating accumulation into cold storage/ETFs
ETF flows — $125B AUM spot BTC ETFs, institutional flow now dominates price action
Hash Ribbons — miner capitulation indicator, 30-day MA crossing below 60-day MA
NUPL (Net Unrealized Profit/Loss) — near zero suggests market-wide break-even, capitulation zone
Realized Price — cost basis of all BTC holders, acts as strong support in bear markets
Options implied volatility term structure — inverted term structure signals fear

fundamental_drivers.etf_adoption: Spot BTC ETFs hold $125B AUM (2026). ETF flows are now the dominant marginal buyer/seller. Net inflow = bullish, net outflow = bearish. New variable not present in prior cycles.
fundamental_drivers.halving_cycle: April 2024 halving. Historically, 12-18 months post-halving sees cycle peak. Current timeline: 14 months post-halving.
fundamental_drivers.macro_liquidity: Fed rate path, global M2, DXY. BTC correlates with liquidity conditions 0.60+ over medium horizons.
fundamental_drivers.miner_economics: Post-halving block reward 3.125 BTC. Hash rate at ATH despite revenue pressure. Miner capitulation (hash ribbon cross) is a historically strong bottom signal.

cross_asset_correlations.nasdaq: Correlation 0.50-0.65 in 2025-2026, increased from 0.30 pre-ETF era
cross_asset_correlations.gold: Low correlation 0.10-0.25 normally. Occasional negative correlation during liquidity crises.
cross_asset_correlations.ETH: High correlation 0.85-0.92. ETH amplifies BTC moves 1.2-1.5x.

seasonal_patterns.strongest_months: October (historically 'Uptober', 70%+ positive), Q1 (January-March in post-halving year)
seasonal_patterns.weakest_months: June-September typically weak, September historically worst month (55% negative)
seasonal_patterns.current_context: June weakness is seasonally expected. $75K→$61K drop aligns with typical post-halving year summer correction.
seasonal_patterns.halving_year_pattern: Post-halving year (2025) typically sees peak in Q4 or Q1 of following year (2026)

papers_and_models: AltcoinTrading.NET (2026) — Blending on-chain data with ML models (LSTM, XGBoost, TFT) for trading edge
SpotedCrypto (Mar 2026) — 5 of 7 core on-chain metrics flashing bottom signals
Glassnode (2025) — SOPR + exchange flow composite: 74% directional accuracy over 7d
Amberdata (2026) — Realized Price as 2026 valuation anchor, cost-basis cohort analysis
CheckOnChain (2026) — Bitcoin Barometer: 27 metrics condensed to single weekly score

recommended_new_signals.description: Track daily net BTC ETF inflows/outflows. 5-day rolling sum as momentum signal. Net outflow >$500M/week = SELL, net inflow >$1B/week = BUY.
recommended_new_signals.expected_accuracy: 60-65% estimated based on 2024-2025 ETF flow data correlation with 7d forward returns

recommended_new_signals.description: Weighted composite: SOPR(0.3) + Exchange Netflow(0.3) + MVRV(0.2) + NUPL(0.2). More robust than individual metrics.
Ratio of spot price to aggregate realized price. When spot < 1.1x realized price, historically strong BUY. When spot > 3.5x realized price, historically strong SELL.

deep_dives.implementation_notes: Current on-chain signal (#13) already at 60% accuracy — good baseline. The $75K→$61K drop has pushed MVRV into the 1.0-1.5 accumulation band where historical 12-month forward returns are 7/7 positive since 2013. aSOPR at 0.97-0.99 confirms capitulation phase. Exchange reserves at 7-year low is structurally bullish. The new ETF variable makes prior cycle analogies imperfect — ETF flows are now the marginal price setter. Recommended: prioritize ETF Flow Momentum signal and SOPR+Exchange composite over incremental on-chain metric additions.

key_predictive_features: ETH/BTC ratio — trend indicator for ETH relative strength; declining ratio means ETH underperforming
DeFi TVL on Ethereum — 68% of all DeFi TVL, leading indicator of ecosystem health
L2 TVL and transaction volume — L2 share rising from 27% to 55% of total Ethereum TVL
Staking yield and percentage staked — 33% of supply staked at 3-4% APR
ETH ETF flows — $27.63B AUM by Q3 2025, institutional demand signal
Gas fees (EIP-1559 burn rate) — high burn = high usage = bullish; low burn = low activity
Validator count and exit queue — validator growth rate and net entries as sentiment indicator
BTC correlation — 0.85-0.92 correlation, ETH amplifies BTC 1.2-1.5x

fundamental_drivers.network_upgrades: Pectra (May 2025): validator caps 32→2048 ETH, account abstraction. Fusaka (Dec 2025): L2 scaling. Glamsterdam (2026): biggest upcoming catalyst.
fundamental_drivers.defi_dominance: 68% of DeFi TVL on Ethereum mainnet. $130-140B total DeFi TVL. L2 TVL projected to exceed L1 by Q3 2026.
fundamental_drivers.staking_economics: 35.6M ETH staked (29.4% of supply), 3.1% average yield. Institutional adoption via ETFs. Supply lock reduces liquid supply.
fundamental_drivers.competitive_landscape: Solana, Avalanche, Sui competing for DeFi/NFT activity. ETH maintaining dominance but L2 fragmentation is a risk.
fundamental_drivers.eth_btc_dynamics: ETH has underperformed BTC in 2025-2026. Ratio compression means ETH needs independent catalysts (Glamsterdam, DeFi summer) to outperform.

cross_asset_correlations.BTC: Highest correlation: 0.85-0.92. ETH rarely moves independently. BTC direction determines ETH direction 85%+ of the time.
cross_asset_correlations.DeFi_tokens: High correlation 0.70-0.85 with major DeFi tokens (UNI, AAVE, MKR)
cross_asset_correlations.SOL: Correlation 0.75-0.85 — competing L1s move together in risk-on/off
cross_asset_correlations.gas_fees: Positive but lagged: sustained high gas precedes price increases by 1-2 weeks

seasonal_patterns.follows_btc: ETH seasonal patterns largely mirror BTC with higher amplitude
seasonal_patterns.defi_summer_effect: Historically June-August can see DeFi-driven ETH outperformance (2020, 2021). Less reliable in 2025-2026.
seasonal_patterns.eth_btc_ratio_seasonal: ETH tends to outperform BTC in Q1 and underperform in Q4 based on 2020-2025 data
seasonal_patterns.current_context: Following BTC down with amplified moves. ETH/BTC ratio declining suggests ETH-specific weakness beyond BTC correlation.

papers_and_models: Symbiosis Finance (2026) — Ethereum ecosystem analysis: DeFi TVL shifts, L2 dominance trends
CoinLaw DeFi Statistics (2025) — TVL, token caps, user adoption metrics for predictive modeling
Eco.com L2 Analysis (2026) — Layer 2 fees, TVL, TPS comparison as ETH demand proxy

recommended_new_signals.description: Track 7-day rate of change in Ethereum DeFi TVL. Rising TVL = capital inflow = bullish. Falling TVL = capital flight = bearish. Use DeFiLlama API.
recommended_new_signals.expected_accuracy: 55-60% estimated — TVL changes correlate with but don't predict price perfectly

recommended_new_signals.description: EMA(20) vs EMA(50) on ETH/BTC ratio. When ETH/BTC trending up, overweight ETH signals. When trending down, underweight. Acts as regime filter for ETH-specific alpha.
recommended_new_signals.expected_accuracy: Regime filter — improves other signal accuracy rather than standalone prediction
recommended_new_signals.data_source: Existing price data (both tickers already collected)

recommended_new_signals.description: Composite of L2 transaction count, TVL growth, and unique addresses across top 5 Ethereum L2s. Rising L2 activity = growing ecosystem demand for ETH (gas/settlement).
recommended_new_signals.expected_accuracy: Unknown — novel signal, needs 90+ days shadow testing

recommended_new_signals.description: Track change in ETH staking APR. Rising yield = increasing network activity = bullish. Falling yield = decreasing demand = bearish.
recommended_new_signals.expected_accuracy: 50-55% — slow-moving signal, better for medium-term bias
recommended_new_signals.data_source: Beaconchain API or Lido/RocketPool rate feeds

deep_dives.implementation_notes: ETH is heavily BTC-correlated (0.85-0.92), so most ETH-specific signals add marginal value over BTC signal pass-through. The highest-value ETH-specific features are: (1) ETH/BTC ratio trend as a regime filter — when ratio is declining, reduce ETH position sizes regardless of absolute signals; (2) DeFi TVL momentum as a leading indicator of ecosystem health. Our existing Crypto Macro signal (#10, 54.5%) already covers DeFi TVL partially. ML Classifier is active for ETH (55.1% 3h) — this per-ticker override is working. Glamsterdam hard fork is the key 2026 catalyst to watch for ETH/BTC ratio reversal.
